focus: Validate the live deep-loop data contracts first: inspect real reducer inputs, JSONL records, and delta expectations in both sk-deep-review and sk-deep-research so the resource-map design is grounded in shipped shapes rather than packet assumptions.

label: Prompt-pack canonical append schema is narrower than the live reducer and review-mode contracts
Reducer boundary sits after post-dispatch validation and already owns registry/strategy/dashboard synchronization
Phase-013 spec assumes nested delta arrays even though shipped delta files are line-oriented event streams
Resource-map emission must preserve the phase-012 ten-category skeleton and category precedence rules

direction: Use packet-spec nested findings[] delta shape as extractor input
reason: Live deep-loop delta contracts are event-stream JSONL and need normalization before shared extraction

direction: Generate resource-map.md from the leaf-agent contract
reason: The stable workflow boundary is post-dispatch validation plus reducer synchronization, so agent-level emission would couple to executor/prompt drift
